campus.name: Smart Village Campus
campus.description: Technology-focused campus located within Egypt’s Smart Village, integrating logistics education with digital infrastructure and modern business environments.

college.name: College of International Transport and Logistics – Smart Village
college.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport
college.positioning: Digitally oriented logistics and transport college emphasizing modern supply chains, international standards, and technology-enabled education.
college.vision: To promote excellence in transport, logistics, and supply chain education across Egypt, the Arab region, and Africa through innovation, quality, and international integration.
college.mission: To deliver high-quality undergraduate and graduate education in transport, supply chain management, and international trade logistics, supported by applied research, industry partnerships, and consultancy that serve society and the global logistics sector.

international: Foundation for International Business Administration Accreditation (FIBAA)

quality_assurance.description: International quality framework aligned with FIBAA accreditation, ISO standards, and European Bologna and ECTS systems.

degree.degree_name: B.Sc. in Trade Logistics and International Transport Management

departments_programs.name: Logistics and Supply Chain Management
departments_programs.focus: End-to-end supply chain integration, inventory control, procurement, and global logistics systems

departments_programs.name: Logistics of International Trade
departments_programs.focus: Trade operations, customs, freight forwarding, global trade compliance

departments_programs.name: Transport Logistics Management
departments_programs.focus: Transport systems, multimodal logistics, air and land transport operations

student_support.language_support: English enhancement for Arabic track students

best_for: Students interested in modern and digital logistics
Students seeking international accreditation and equivalency
Students targeting corporate and multinational careers
less_suitable_for: Students seeking purely maritime or port-focused education

unique_strengths: First logistics college in Egypt with German FIBAA accreditation
Alignment with European Bologna and ECTS systems
